titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا عِتْقَ إِلَّا بَعْدَ مِلْكٍ
titles.en: Chapter 3 – It is not an emancipation except after the ownership

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا عِتْقَ إِلَّا بَعْدَ مِلْكٍ
titles.en: Chapter 3 – It is not an emancipation except after the ownership

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا طَلَاقَ قَبْلَ نِكَاحٍ وَ لَا عِتْقَ قَبْلَ مِلْكٍ .
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا طَلَاقَ قَبْلَ نِكَاحٍ وَ لَا عِتْقَ قَبْلَ مِلْكٍ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Mansour Bin Hazam,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘There is no divorce before the marriage, and there is no emancipation before the ownership’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Mansour Bin Hazam,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘There is no divorce before the marriage, and there is no emancipation before the ownership’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا عِتْقَ إِلَّا بَعْدَ مِلْكٍ
titles.en: Chapter 3 – It is not an emancipation except after the ownership

segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا عِتْقَ إِلَّا بَعْدَ مِلْكٍ .
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا عِتْقَ إِلَّا بَعْدَ مِلْكٍ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan Bin Shamoun, from Abdullah Bin Abdul Rahman Al Asamma, from Misma’a Abu Sayyar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘There is no emancipation except after ownership’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan Bin Shamoun, from Abdullah Bin Abdul Rahman Al Asamma, from Misma’a Abu Sayyar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘There is no emancipation except after ownership’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ شَمُّونٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْأَصَمِّ عَنْ مِسْمَعٍ أَبِي سَيَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

parts.text: عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْأَصَمِّ
